sqlMap.insert: insert into c_yzd_chemical_t (companyid,belongtype,chemicalname,purpose,chemicaltype,packingtype,validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo) values ($companyid$,$belongtype$,'$chemicalname$','$purpose$','$chemicaltype$','$packingtype$', 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(id) from c_yzd_chemical_t where validflag > 0
companyid = $companyid$
belongtype = $belongtype$
chemicalname = '$chemicalname$'
purpose = '$purpose$'
chemicaltype = '$chemicaltype$'
packingtype = '$packingtype$'

select a.*,b.basicName as belongtypemsg,c.basicName as realName from c_yzd_chemical_t a left join sys_basic_msg_t b on a.belongtype = b.id left join sys_basic_msg_t c on a.chemicalname = c.id where a.validflag > 0
a.companyid = $companyid$
(c.basicname like '%$chemicalname$%')
a.belongtype = $belongtype$
a.purpose = '$purpose$'
a.chemicaltype = '$chemicaltype$'
a.packingtype = '$packingtype$'
order by a.id

select a.*,b.basicName as belongtypemsg,c.basicName as realName from c_yzd_chemical_t a left join sys_basic_msg_t b on a.belongtype = b.id left join sys_basic_msg_t c on a.chemicalname = c.id where a.validflag > 0 and a.id = $id$
select * from c_yzd_chemical_t where validflag > 0 and companyid = $companyid$
sqlMap.update:
update c_yzd_chemical_t set belongtype=$belongtype$,chemicalname='$chemicalname$', purpose='$purpose$',chemicaltype='$chemicaltype$',packingtype='$packingtype$', updateoperator='$updateoperator$',updatetime='$updatetime$',memo='$memo$'
companyid = $companyid$
where id = $id$
update c_yzd_chemical_t set validflag = 0 where id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select id,chemicalname from c_yzd_chemical_t where id in $idlist$
